## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test addition/fix

- [ ] CI / maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows [style guide](CONTRIBUTING.md#code-style) (2-space indent, snake_case)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] New features have corresponding tests
- [ ] `bash -n` passes on all modified files
- [ ] `bash tests/run_tests.sh` passes
- [ ] `AGENTS.md` updated if architecture changes
- [ ] Commit messages follow [conventional format](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
